question.label: Set the frame
question.name: Before we get into specifics, what would be most useful to talk through today?
question.description: Gives James control over the agenda and establishes a low-pressure starting point.

answer: Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
